background_template: {name} has been shooting out of {location} since {founded}. One photographer, one battered camera bag, and a diary that fills up by March. {quirk}
neighbourhoods: a daylight studio over the antiques market
a converted stable block just outside town
the top floor of the old telephone exchange
a lock-up studio behind the framers
a shared studio in the arts centre
a garden studio at the end of the lane
quirks: The studio sofa has appeared in more family portraits than any family.
They shoot film for themselves and digital for everyone else, and won't explain the difference twice.
Every wedding ends with one frame of the photographer's shoes. It's a whole thing.
The backdrop collection has its own insurance policy.
Clients get their galleries with a handwritten note. Always have, always will.
There's a print on the wall that isn't for sale and everyone asks anyway.
pains: everyone emails asking the same three things: prices, travel, and how many photos they get
our packages live in a PDF from 2022 with the wrong prices on it
people don't know we do family shoots as well as weddings
enquiries arrive at midnight wanting an answer by breakfast
half the calls are just people asking if a date is free

products.name: Wedding — Full Day
products.description: Prep to first dance. Two of everything important.

products.name: Wedding — Half Day
products.description: Ceremony through speeches. The greatest hits.

products.name: Engagement Shoot
products.description: An hour somewhere that matters to you. Practice for the big one.

products.name: Family Session (90 min)
products.description: Park or studio. Chaos welcome, encouraged even.

products.name: Newborn Session
products.description: Slow, warm, unhurried. Babies set the schedule.

products.name: Portrait Session (Studio)
products.description: One hour, one person, proper light.

products.name: Pet Portraits
products.description: Yes, really. Bring treats and low expectations of dignity.

products.name: Headshots — Individual
products.description: Twenty minutes to a LinkedIn photo that looks like you.

products.name: Headshots — Team Half-Day
products.description: The whole office, matched and consistent, in one morning.

products.name: Fine Art Print — A3
products.description: Giclée on cotton rag. From any gallery image.

products.name: Fine Art Print — A2
products.description: The one that goes above the sofa.

products.name: Album — 30-Page Linen
products.description: Designed, proofed, and bound to outlive us all.

products.name: Gift Voucher
products.description: For the person who has everything except photos of themselves.

awkward.name: Wedding — Two Photographers, Full Weekend Coverage incl. Rehearsal Dinner & Sunday Brunch (Limited Dates)
awkward.description: The whole weekend, told properly. Two a year, no more.

awkward.name: Autumn Golden Hour Sessions
awkward.description: Book in August. They go in a day.

features.name: packages & prices listing
features.description: Every package and print with its price. If it's on the page, nobody has to email asking.

features.name: booking enquiry form
features.description: Name, email, the date, and what kind of shoot. The date matters most — lead with the date.

features.name: portfolio gallery
features.description: A proper gallery of our work. The photos do the selling; the page just has to get out of their way.

features.name: client testimonials
features.description: A few kind words from past couples and clients. People book people.

features.name: shoot type filter
features.description: Weddings, portraits, commercial — let people jump to the one they came for.

features.name: navigation
features.description: A way to move around the page. Nothing that upstages the photographs.

constraints: It has to work on a phone. Couples plan weddings from bed.
Our brand colour is #4A5759. Please use it.
Big images. If the photos are small, the page has failed.
Don't invent packages. If it isn't in the file, we don't offer it.
The prices on the page have to match the file we sent. Exactly.
No music. No sound at all. Ever.
